title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog - Cancel then Go to Settings
scenario: Notifications toggle in App Settings shows OS settings dialog when notifications were denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. During onboarding, deny the Notifications permission when prompted.
3. Complete onboarding and land on the Home screen.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger or profile) to open the side navigation.
5. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
6. Attempt to toggle the Notifications switch to ON.
8. Tap the Cancel button on the dialog.
10. Tap the Go to Settings button on the dialog.
expected: 1. After step 6: A dialog appears stating the user must go to OS settings to re-enable notifications, with Cancel and Go to Settings buttons. 2. After step 8: The dialog dismisses and the user returns to the Notifications tab with the toggle remaining OFF. 3. After step 10: The user is navigated to the OS notification settings for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
